element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players begin as General Hawk before choosing alternate characters
Progressive acquisition across routes; retained when selecting new stages via debug menu
Lost upon stage selection (unlike weapon upgrades)
Area-specific boss fights accessed after completing routes
Each zone contains multiple selectable routes; less linear than predecessor
Unused chime sound suggests audio feedback for discovery
Stages with airborne enemy attacks use standardized missile graphics
Wet Suit had swimming sprites but functionality removed; originally planned for certain stages

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear branching structure allows player-controlled pacing; multiple routes per area provide relief through choice; boss gates create tension peaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret statues hidden in levels; password system suggests exploration-based progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Statues appear to be collectibles with associated audio cue (unused chime sound effect)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction via General Hawk with basic moveset; safe introduction context before weapon acquisition
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multiple routes open choice in challenge; progressive weapon and health upgrades; miniboss variety introduces different attack patterns (bouncing, energy bursts, aerial)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Area-specific boss fights; increased reliance on weapon mastery and route knowledge

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 6 areas contains multiple selectable routes (numbered 1-3 per debug stage select), creating non-linear progression. Completing routes leads to area boss. Less linear than predecessor.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Areas A-F accessible via debug stage select

notable_level_patterns.description: Specific stages feature airborne enemies attacking from above; two primary missile sprite variants used across these stages
Each area has dedicated boss fight accessible only after completing routes. Post-boss cutscenes mark story progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Boss fight rows in debug stage select (row 5: A-F for each zone's boss)

notable_level_patterns.description: Duke rescue stage inaccessible until Spirit acquired; dialogue references multi-step unlock. Feature remains partially cut (no stage revisit without memory hacking).
